nasb.text: The garment, whether the warp or the woof, or any article of leather from which the mark has departed when you washed it, it shall then be washed a second time and will be clean.”

esv.text: But the garment, or the warp or the woof, or any article made of skin from which the disease departs when you have washed it, shall then be washed a second time, and be clean.”

cnv.text: 如果病症離開了，經過洗淨，剩下的衣服，無論編結的或是紡織的，或任何皮子做的物件，只要再洗一次，就潔淨了。”

ccb.text: 如果洗过衣服、编织品或皮革后，霉斑消失了，要再洗一次就洁净了。
